attributes.description: Alerts when `redis.slaves.connected == 0`. Primary has no replicas — HA / read scaling lost.
attributes.name: [Redis OTel] Primary has no connected replicas

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis primary has no connected replicas

### What fired
`redis.slaves.connected == 0` during the window.

### Why it matters
A primary without replicas cannot fail over and cannot serve replica reads. The failover SLA is compromised.

### Triage
1. Check replica processes / Sentinel / Cluster state.
2. Inspect the replication link.

### Remediation
- Restore replicas or fix replication.

### Tuning
- Filter out standalone instances.
